events.title: Events
events.name: Event Name
events.no_events: No events available at the moment

email.footer: This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.
email.confirmation_body: You have successfully registered for {{event}} on {{date}} at {{time}}, {{venue}}. Please arrive 15 minutes early.
email.reminder_body: This is a friendly reminder that {{event}} is scheduled for tomorrow at {{time}}, {{venue}}. We look forward to seeing you.
email.cancellation_body: We regret to inform you that {{event}} scheduled for {{date}} has been cancelled. We apologize for the inconvenience.
email.welcome_subject: Welcome to the Event Management System
email.welcome_body: Your account has been created successfully. You can now browse and register for events.
email.reset_body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the link below. This link expires in 1 hour. If you did not request this, ignore this email.

sms.reminder: Reminder: {{event}} tomorrow at {{time}}. See you there! - EMS
sms.cancellation: {{event}} on {{date}} has been cancelled. Sorry for the inconvenience. - EMS
sms.otp: Your EMS verification code is {{code}}. Expires in 10 minutes.
sms.welcome: Welcome to EMS! Your account is ready. Login at {{url}}

chatbot.greeting: Hello! I am your Event Assistant. How can I help you today?
chatbot.help_options: I can help you with: 1) Browse events 2) Register for events 3) Check your registrations 4) Contact support
chatbot.no_events: There are no upcoming events at the moment. Check back soon!
chatbot.register_help: To register for an event, go to the Events page and click Register on any event you are interested in.
chatbot.no_registrations: You have not registered for any events yet.
chatbot.contact_support: For further assistance, please email support@yourdomain.com or call our helpline.
chatbot.unknown: I did not understand that. Please try again or type HELP to see what I can do.
chatbot.goodbye: Thank you for using Event Assistant. Have a great day!

pdf.no_data: No data available for this report

errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to view this page
errors.server_error: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.validation: Please check your input and try again
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please login again.
